title: ODbL building-footprint candidate adapter (e.g., MS Buildings)
context: Large ODbL-licensed building-footprint datasets (e.g., Microsoft GlobalMLBuildingFootprints, licensed ODbL) are a high-value source for gap detection in under-mapped regions. This adapter ingests such a dataset and produces a reviewed candidate list in the candidates-009 format. It is contentious: building footprint imports have a history of quality issues and community pushback. The adapter must be strictly candidate-list-only — never auto-import — and any actual contribution of footprints to OSM requires the full Import Guidelines process, community approval, and a dedicated import account.
objective: Build and ship a read-only ODbL building-footprint candidate adapter that ingests an authorized building-footprint dataset and produces a reviewed candidate list in candidates-009 format.
acceptanceCriteria: Adapter ingests an ODbL-licensed building-footprint dataset and produces a reviewed candidate list in candidates-009 format with per-footprint provenance and humanReviewRequired:true.
Adapter is strictly read-only and candidate-list-only: no auto-import, no upload, no OSM write credentials.
Any downstream use of the candidates for an actual OSM contribution requires the full Import Guidelines process (separate task).
odblCompatible:true is verified from the source dataset's license citation before any candidate is emitted; incompatible sources are rejected.
Ships committed golden fixtures; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint passes green.
Code is licensed MIT; commits are DCO signed-off.
Reviewed by the technical reviewer and licensing/imagery reviewer.
resources: PLAN.md — Data, licensing section; Candidate-list-first decision
output: A merged PR containing the read-only ODbL building-footprint candidate adapter, golden fixtures, and passing CI, with strict candidate-list-only output and no import code path.
